task_text: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS in relevant folders, and used canonical cast record authority for birthday.
function.outcome_justification: Using today's date from context (2026-03-23), the next birthday date among visible cast birthday records is 03-26. Canonical record 10_entities/cast/lukas.md identifies the exact name as Lukas Brenner.
